tasks.title: Fix/verify test suite passes
tasks.notes: drizzle-kit push may fail in vitest global setup. Run bun run test, diagnose failures, fix global-setup.ts if needed. Stop Hook gates nothing if tests don't pass.

tasks.title: Add CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)
tasks.notes: Tier 3 feedback loop is missing. Create .github/workflows/ci.yml — lint + typecheck + test on push/PR. Plan: progress/features/ci-pipeline.md

tasks.title: Plan sprint v0.2.0 with gap analysis tasks
tasks.notes: Gap analysis of project vs harness planning docs. Identified 13 improvements, added as v0.2.0 tasks.

tasks.title: Add scripts/init.sh startup script
tasks.notes: Bootstrap script: install deps, create .env from .env.example if missing, run drizzle-kit push, start Redis, run smoke test. Plan: progress/features/init-script.md

tasks.title: Automate quality scores measurement
tasks.notes: scores.json is all zeros, 8 days stale. Create scripts/update-quality.ts — run vitest --coverage, parse JSON, count biome violations per layer, write scores.json. Plan: progress/features/quality-scores-automation.md

tasks.title: Add auth e2e tests
tasks.notes: Better Auth is wired but has zero tests. Add tests/e2e/auth.test.ts — register, login, access protected route, verify JWT scoping. Plan: progress/features/auth-e2e-tests.md

tasks.title: Add service unit tests (ai.ts)
tasks.notes: src/services/ai.ts has no tests. Add tests/unit/services/ai.test.ts. Mock Anthropic SDK, test generateText, error handling.

tasks.title: Document retry/loop bounding policy
tasks.notes: No policy for CI retries or agent self-repair loops. Add rule to .claude/rules/ or CLAUDE.md: max 3 CI retries, stop and report after 2 failed self-repair attempts.

tasks.title: Add protected route (full 6-layer request flow)
tasks.notes: Only /health (public) exists. Build one CRUD endpoint (e.g. /api/tasks) that exercises all 6 layers: Types → Config → Repos → Services → Providers → Routes. Plan: progress/features/protected-route.md

tasks.title: Adopt worktree isolation model (ADR)
tasks.notes: No isolation strategy for parallel tasks. Document in ADR: use Claude Code worktree support for one-task-per-worktree. Ref setup manual §6.3.

tasks.title: Add context management rules
tasks.notes: No compaction or large-output offloading policy. Create .claude/rules/context.md with guidelines: cap search results, write large output to files, summarize stale history.

tasks.title: Add BullMQ worker smoke test
tasks.notes: Redis + BullMQ configured but no workers exist. Defer until a feature needs background jobs. Create minimal worker + test when TASK-014 introduces queue usage.

tasks.title: Set up harness effectiveness metrics
tasks.notes: Track first-pass CI success rate, rework rate, agent task success rate. Start after CI is in place. Add simple tracking to progress/ or docs/quality/.

known_issues: drizzle-kit push may fail in vitest global-setup.ts — needs diagnosis (TASK-006)
tech_debt: BullMQ queue configured but no workers exist
